base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of world_4_3_layout — a tile (level_layout) from 1985 super mario bros. Mushroom-platforms over death-pits — red shrooms. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Mushroom-platforms over death-pits — red shrooms; easiest way is to use Koopa-shell-kickback to bounce off mushroom tops.
